hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx|css|json)$' || exit 0; [ -f node_modules/.bin/prettier ] && node_modules/.bin/prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; [ -f node_modules/.bin/eslint ] && node_modules/.bin/eslint --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; (echo "$f" | grep -q 'locales/' && echo "$f" | grep -q '\.json$' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Locale file updated. Sync all translation keys to the other locale files."}}') || true; } 2>/dev/null || true
echo '{"systemMessage":"Review gates: Phase 2 -> cavecrew-reviewer | Phase 4 -> verify skill | Phase 5 -> security-review skill"}'

cd /home/jfrigoli/Documents/test-ai/expire-snap && if ! git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo '{"systemMessage":"⚠️ Git not initialized — run: git init && git remote add origin <url>"}'; exit 0; fi; UNPUSHED=$(git log origin/HEAD..HEAD --oneline 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$UNPUSHED" -gt 0 ]; then git push origin HEAD > /tmp/gp.log 2>&1 && echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"↑ Pushed $UNPUSHED previously committed task(s)\"}" || echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"⚠️ Push of previous commits failed — $(tail -1 /tmp/gp.log | sed 's/\"/\\\"/g')\"}"; fi; git add -A; git diff --cached --quiet && exit 0; MSG=$(grep '^- \[x\]' PLAN.md 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | sed 's/^- \[x\] //' | cut -c1-72); if git commit -m "${MSG:-sync}" && git push origin HEAD > /tmp/gp.log 2>&1; then echo '{"systemMessage":"✓ Pushed to GitHub"}'; else echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"⚠️ Git push failed — $(tail -1 /tmp/gp.log | sed 's/\"/\\\"/g')\"}"; fi
